basic_strike.name: Basic Strike
basic_strike.description: Deal 100% of attack as damage to the enemy

magic_missile.name: Magic Missile
magic_missile.description: Deal 120% of attack as damage to the enemy

emilia_silver_blizzard.name: Silver Blizzard
emilia_silver_blizzard.description: Deal 65% of attack as damage and inflict enemy with 1 Permafrost.

emilia_frost_petal.name: Frost Petal
emilia_frost_petal.description: Double number of Permafrost stacks on opponent.

conceal.name: Conceal
conceal.description: Gain conceal for 2 turns (makes the user invincible - cannot take damage nor debuffs)

poison_blade.name: Poison Blade
poison_blade.description: Deal 90% attack damage and apply poison for 45% attack damage per turn for 3 turns

holy_strike.name: Holy Strike
holy_strike.description: Deal 110% of attack as damage and recover 10% of damage dealt

blessing.name: Blessing
blessing.description: Recover 25% of max health and increase damage reduction by 10% for 2 turns

blood_drain.name: Blood Drain
blood_drain.description: Deal 90% attack damage and recover 50% of damage dealt

bat_swarm.name: Bat Swarm
bat_swarm.description: Deal 85% attack damage and reduce enemy attack by 15% for 3 turns

lightning_bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning_bolt.description: Deal 110% attack damage with 25% chance to stun for 1 turn

divine_wrath.name: Divine Wrath
divine_wrath.description: Deal 130% attack damage and gain 25% attack for 3 turns

nature_heal.name: Nature's Embrace
nature_heal.description: Recover 40% max health and gain 15% damage reduction for 3 turns

thorn_volley.name: Thorn Volley
thorn_volley.description: Deal 85% attack damage and apply poison for 4 turns

plague_cloud.name: Plague Cloud
plague_cloud.description: Apply poison dealing 60% attack damage per turn for 4 turns

antidote.name: Antidote
antidote.description: Remove all debuffs and recover 20% of max health

hunters_mark.name: Hunter's Mark
hunters_mark.description: Mark enemy, increasing damage dealt to them by 25% for 4 turns

charm.name: Charm
charm.description: Reduce enemy attack by 30% and recover 15% of max health

dark_magic.name: Dark Magic
dark_magic.description: Deal 120% attack damage and reduce enemy defense by 20% for 3 turns

royal_decree.name: Royal Decree
royal_decree.description: Increase all stats by 20% for 3 turns

golden_strike.name: Golden Strike
golden_strike.description: Deal 110% attack damage and gain 15% lifesteal for 3 turns

tentacle_slam.name: Tentacle Slam
tentacle_slam.description: Deal 115% attack damage and reduce enemy defense by 20% for 3 turns

ink_cloud.name: Ink Cloud
ink_cloud.description: Reduce enemy attack by 30% and gain 20% damage reduction for 3 turns

cute_meow.name: Cute Meow
cute_meow.description: Confuse enemy, reducing their attack by 40% for 2 turns

royal_command.name: Royal Command
royal_command.description: Deal 90% attack damage and stun enemy for 1 turn

monarch_aura.name: Monarch's Aura
monarch_aura.description: Increase damage by 30% and reduce incoming damage by 20% for 4 turns

divine_punishment.name: Divine Punishment
divine_punishment.description: Deal 180% attack damage and recover 30% of damage dealt

seduction.name: Seduction
seduction.description: Steal 25% of enemy's current health and add it to your own

righteous_fury.name: Righteous Fury
righteous_fury.description: Deal damage equal to 150% attack + 50% of missing health

value_over_self.name: Value Over Self
value_over_self.description: Take 1 true damage and deal 110% of attack as damage

plannification.name: Plannification
plannification.description: Take 1 true damage, recover 10% max health, and gain +5 attack for 4 turns

construction_site.name: Construction Site
construction_site.description: Deploy a domain for 2 turns. While active, shields cannot be gained and all shields are removed. At the end of each player's turn, they take 5 true damage.

predation.name: Predation
predation.description: Deal 80% attack, 70% defense, and 10% current health as damage

devour.name: Devour
devour.description: Every turn, becomes a random skill your opponent has. Upon use cast it twice.

rimuru_stance.name: Predator Stance
rimuru_stance.description: Enter a defensive stance for 2 enemy turns. While active, gain +4 defense and recover 6 health at the start of your turn.

room_incision.name: Room: Incision
room_incision.description: Deal 110% attack damage and recover 15% of max health

takt_breaker.name: Takt Breaker
takt_breaker.description: Deal 80% of attack as damage, then deal 30% of the enemy's current health as damage.

room_domain.name: Room
room_domain.description: Deploy ROOM for 2 turns. While active, enemy skills gain +1 cooldown. Only one domain can exist at a time.

shambles_precision.name: Shambles Precision
shambles_precision.description: Remove the enemy's stance and deal 75% of attack as damage. If a stance was removed, this damage is true damage.

slap.name: Slap
slap.description: Deal 30% of attack as damage and recover 8% of max health

grit.name: Grit
grit.description: Enter a stance that stores all damage you take. Use again to end the stance and deal 50% of stored damage as true damage.

get_serious.name: Get Serious
get_serious.description: Transform into serious form and recover 10% of max health

serious_side_steps.name: Serious Side Steps
serious_side_steps.description: Deal 80% of attack and reduce enemy defense by 10 for 3 turns

limitless_dominion.name: Limitless Dominion
limitless_dominion.description: For 6 turns, damage becomes healing and healing becomes damage. Only one domain can exist at a time. Using Ultimate resets recovery count to 0.

chen_dragon_strike.name: Dragon Strike
chen_dragon_strike.description: Deal 110% of attack as damage. Cooldown reduction applied to this skill grants it +15% of attack. If it was applied 3 or more times also gain +3 defense permanently.

chen_piercing_assault.name: Piercing Assault
chen_piercing_assault.description: Deal 90% of attack as damage. If another one of your skills has at least 3 cooldown reduction stacks, remove enemy shield before dealing damage.

chen_tactical_reduction.name: Tactical Reduction
chen_tactical_reduction.description: Apply 1 cooldown reduction to a random other skill and deal 20% of attack as true damage.

chen_crimson_ult.name: Crimson Unsheath
chen_crimson_ult.description: Deal 100% of attack as damage. Repeat this skill for each cooldown reduction applied to it. If it was applied 3 or more times also reduce cooldown of all your other skills by 1.

gojo_strike.name: Strike
gojo_strike.description: Deal 100% of attack as damage. If Limitless Dominion is active, opponent recovers 25% max health instead

infinity_rebound.name: Infinity Rebound
infinity_rebound.description: Enter a stance for 3 enemy turns. While stance is active, when you take damage from opposing skills, deal that much damage to opponent then recovers opponent for half the amount. Take is replaced by recover and vice versa if Limitless Dominion is active.

reversed_curse_technique.name: Reversed Curse Technique
reversed_curse_technique.description: Take 10 true damage, evade for 1 turn, and gain +3 ATK for 2 turns

darling_bite.name: Darling Bite
darling_bite.description: Deal 95% of attack as damage and apply Kiss Mark for 4 turns. Kiss Mark grants Heartbreak equal to target's restored health.

heartbreak_harvest.name: Heartbreak Harvest
heartbreak_harvest.description: Recover health equal to your current Heartbreak.

dont_hurt_me_baby.name: Don't Hurt Me Baby
dont_hurt_me_baby.description: Enter a stance for 3 turns. When taking damage from an enemy skill, gain twice the Heartbreak and counterattack for (1% per Heartbreak) of attack.

unrivaled_love.name: Unrivaled Love
unrivaled_love.description: Evade for 1 turn and opponent recovers 12 health

kiss_of_death.name: KISS OF DEATH
kiss_of_death.description: Deal (125% + 1% per Heartbreak) of attack as damage. While this ultimate is ready, each of your turns you do not use it grants +10% base damage for future uses. Consume 66 Heartbreak stacks.

ed_rocket_punch.name: Rocket Punch
ed_rocket_punch.description: Deal 95% of attack as damage and generate 20 Heat.

ed_coolant_vent.name: Coolant Vent
ed_coolant_vent.description: Generate 25 Heat then restore health as much Heat as possible by venting Heat (1 health per Heat vented).

equivalent_exchange.name: Equivalent Exchange
equivalent_exchange.description: Enter a stance for 2 enemy turns. When taking damage from an enemy skill, all players gain 1 Heat, then counter for 80% of damage taken.

alchemy.name: Alchemy
alchemy.description: Deploy a domain for 4 turns. While active, whenever a player uses a skill, both players gain 5 Heat.

ed_redline_combo.name: Redline Combo
ed_redline_combo.description: Deal (100% + 1% per Heat) of attack as damage. Consumes all Heat.

naruto_yang_strike.name: Yang Strike
naruto_yang_strike.description: Deal (90% + 6% per Balance) of attack as damage. (Balance ranges from -3 to +3)

naruto_yang_meteor_rain.name: Yang Meteor Rain
naruto_yang_meteor_rain.description: Deal 80% of attack as damage. Repeat this effect for each Balance.

naruto_yin_guard.name: Yin Guard
naruto_yin_guard.description: Recover 16% of max health and deal (80% - 6% per Balance) of attack as damage.

naruto_yin_serenity.name: Yin Serenity
naruto_yin_serenity.description: Enter a stance for 2 turns. While active, when taking damage, create a shield equal to 50% of the damage taken.

naruto_enter_sage_mode.name: Enter Sage Mode
naruto_enter_sage_mode.description: Enter Sage Mode until the end of the game.

frieren_minor_utility.name: Minor Utility Spell
frieren_minor_utility.description: Deal 75% of attack as damage. Gains a bonus effect based on your opponent's last skill type used.

frieren_copycat_glyph.name: Copycat Glyph
frieren_copycat_glyph.description: Your next Minor Utility Spell triggers twice. After each use, increase this effect by 1 (up to the number of pages) and cooldown by 1.

frieren_rotating_page.name: Spell Draft
frieren_rotating_page.description: Adds 1 random Page and triggers its effect. Changes each turn.

frieren_archive_release.name: An Era of Spells
frieren_archive_release.description: Cast Minor Utility Spell 5 times at full power. Cannot be doubled.

naofumi_defensive_stance.name: Defensive Stance
naofumi_defensive_stance.description: Enter a stance for 2 turns and reduce damage taken by 30%.

naofumi_heroic_guard.name: Heroic Guard
naofumi_heroic_guard.description: Inflict Heal Block on the enemy and gain +5 defense for 5 turns.

naofumi_soul_eat.name: Soul Eat
naofumi_soul_eat.description: Remove enemy stance and deal 10% of their max health as true damage.

naofumi_undead_control.name: Undead Control
naofumi_undead_control.description: Enter a stance for 2 turns. While active, recover 40% of damage taken from enemy skills and deal that much true damage to the opponent.

yato_teleportation.name: Teleportation
yato_teleportation.description: Reduce the next attack skill damage to 0. Gain a buff which prevents true damage for 3 turns.

yato_divine_possession.name: Divine Possession
yato_divine_possession.description: Remove 1 stack of Immortality. Once your last stack of Immortality is removed, this skill becomes Last Strike.

yato_last_strike.name: Last Strike
yato_last_strike.description: Deal 80% of attack as true damage.

kaito_price_of_power.name: Price of Power
kaito_price_of_power.description: Recover 5% of max health, gain 5 shield and obtain one new restriction.

kaito_staff_first_aid.name: First Aid
kaito_staff_first_aid.description: Remove 1 debuff and recover 50% of missing health.

kaito_staff_recovery_zone.name: Recovery Zone
kaito_staff_recovery_zone.description: For 1 turn, recover 20% of maximum health at the end of your opponent's turn.

kaito_scythe_minor_curse.name: Reaper's Hex
kaito_scythe_minor_curse.description: Inflict Minor Curse for 3 turns and deal 120% of attack as damage.

kaito_scythe_purge.name: Soul Sever
kaito_scythe_purge.description: Remove shields and stances and deal 130% of attack as damage.

kaito_baton_snap_strike.name: Snap Strike
kaito_baton_snap_strike.description: Deal 50% of attack as true damage.

kaito_baton_reversal_stance.name: Reversal
kaito_baton_reversal_stance.description: For 1 turn, recover 100% of damage taken from attack and debuff skills and counter.

kaito_rifle_headshot.name: Headshot
kaito_rifle_headshot.description: Deal 10% of opponent maximum health as damage. If opponent has 10% or less health this becomes true damage instead.

kaito_rifle_multistrike.name: Multistrike
kaito_rifle_multistrike.description: Deal 75% of attack as damage 4 times.

kaito_trident_ult_seal.name: Luminous Seal
kaito_trident_ult_seal.description: Deal 90% of attack as damage and seal enemy ultimate for 2 turns.

kaito_trident_triple_thrust.name: Triple Thrust
kaito_trident_triple_thrust.description: Deal 86% of attack as damage 3 times.

kaito_rapier_time_cut.name: Time Cut
kaito_rapier_time_cut.description: Deal 100% of attack as damage and reduce all skill cooldowns by 1.

kaito_rapier_evasive_lunge.name: Evasive Lunge
kaito_rapier_evasive_lunge.description: Deal 70% of attack as damage and gain evade for 1 turn.

kaito_shield_bulwark_strike.name: Bulwark Strike
kaito_shield_bulwark_strike.description: Deal 100% of defense as damage and reduce damage taken by 50% for 1 turn.

kaito_shield_fortify.name: Fortify
kaito_shield_fortify.description: Gain a shield equal to defense.

kaito_axe_gash_bleed.name: Gash
kaito_axe_gash_bleed.description: Deal 85% of attack as damage and inflict bleed.

kaito_axe_double_cleave.name: Double Cleave
kaito_axe_double_cleave.description: Deal 85% of attack as damage, twice.

kaito_tome_paragon_cast.name: Paragon Invocation
kaito_tome_paragon_cast.description: Cast 2 random weapon skills ignoring restrictions.

kaito_tome_random_spell.name: Paragon Shuffle
kaito_tome_random_spell.description: Becomes a random weapon skill each turn.

kaito_ultimate.name: Final Roll
kaito_ultimate.description: Deal 140% of attack as damage and use your current Skill 1 as a bonus effect (ignores restrictions).
